summary: Closed TASK-30 after completing CodeWiki architecture migration to application/domain/infrastructure/adapters layout.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Application layer exposes use cases for read state, mutate task, manage session, run heartbeat, setup/bootstrap, and rebuild where appropriate.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Source now organized under application/domain/infrastructure/adapters with Pi entrypoint delegating to application modules.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Ports cover filesystem, project resolution, notification, session access, locking, message delivery, git/subprocess/rebuild needs without importing Pi types.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: application/ports.ts plus infrastructure implementations and rebuild runner seam; architecture check blocks Pi imports outside adapter.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Domain/application modules do not import Pi packages or UI types.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: scripts/check-architecture.mjs passes and forbids @earendil-works/pi-* outside adapters/pi.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Existing Pi tools and commands continue to work through adapters or compatibility wrappers.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: npm test smoke suite and live codewiki_state refresh pass after reload.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: No core/** or engine/** source folders remain.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: find checks and architecture guard confirm removed folders; check fails if they reappear.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Native Node TS runtime import of extension entrypoint and rebuild infrastructure succeeds.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: node -e import('./extensions/codewiki/index.ts') and live codewiki_state refresh pass.
